title: better ore visibility
body:
# better ore visibility
This resource pack makes sure you will see all the ores much better by simplifying the texture to a single color with an animated outline. It also does this for the deepslate and nether variants of the ores and for ancient debris.
## Small preview:
![Alt Text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/u58qKhiv/images/e25d9ba71cb101fe1de53c99a213406ca72e1a2c.gif)
